user.title: Golmar / Quvii account
user.description: Sign in with your Golmar G2Call+ account (or another Quvii-based intercom app). Credentials are used once to fetch each panel's local key; door control afterwards is 100% local. Leave App ID / OEM ID as-is for Golmar.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Quvii cloud.
error.no_devices: Login worked but no devices were found on this account.
